agentStatus: Ghost active · runtime generated snapshot loaded

home.summarySubtitle: Agency, approvals, identity, and apps in one field
home.summaryBody: Rust now generates a runtime snapshot that the native shell can re-read while it is running. That gives SolOS a visible pulse instead of a static conceptual mock.
home.nextActionSubtitle: Make runtime generation the source of visible movement
home.nextActionBody: Regenerate the snapshot and the shell should visibly shift. This keeps architecture work honest by tying backend progress to perceivable product change.

ghost.thesisLabel: Native agent presence should read from explicit runtime state, not scattered UI literals.

quickActions.description: Re-run the Rust generator and watch the shell refresh into a new state without a deep rebuild.
